concerns.text: FR-004 requires partial Spearman correlation for both PHQ-9 and GAD-7. The plan (research.md) explicitly drops GAD-7 due to lack of verified data sources ('GAD-7 dropped'). The plan lacks a task to implement the GAD-7 portion of FR-004 or a formal scope reduction annotation. This leaves FR-004 partially unbacked.

SC-002 requires measuring taxa significance against a threshold of 'at least one taxon' OR 'p-value distribution deviates from uniform'. The plan (research.md) notes a fallback to 'simulation' if data merge fails, but does not define a specific task or metric to measure the p-value distribution deviation (Kolmogorov-Smirnov test) as required by SC-002. The success criterion is unmeasured in the plan.

SC-005 requires verifying covariate adjustment by reporting a p-value change > 0.01 for at least one taxon. The plan (research.md) mentions implementing covariate adjustment but does not include a specific task or output requirement to calculate and report this specific delta (adjusted vs. unadjusted) to satisfy SC-005.

FR-008 requires validating effect direction on an independent cohort IF accessible. The plan (research.md) states 'No verified source found' for independent cohorts and drops the validation step entirely without a conditional task structure (e.g., 'If X exists, run Y; else log skip'). The plan lacks the explicit logic to satisfy the 'IF accessible' clause of FR-008.

SC-003 requires measuring consistency of effect direction across independent cohorts (≥80% match). Since the plan drops the independent cohort analysis (see FR-008 concern), there is no corresponding plan element to measure this success criterion. SC-003 is unbacked.
